articles.title: Vintage Nerds, Abercrombie Has Finally Heard Our Cries
articles.description: Short of scouring the aftermarket yourself, the A&F archive line is the fastest way to score a rugged gem from the brand's '90s-era heyday.
articles.content: The mall-brand renaissance has admittedly cooled off over the last six months, but it’s still one of the most reliable ways to pop into a store and cop solid basics for the low. One label that continues to serve up some of the best cropped hoodies an... [2092 chars]

articles.description: 'CIA' is the newest drama airing on CBS. The show's stars Tom Ellis and Nick Gehlfuss opened up about their bond on and off-screen with Good Housekeeping.
articles.content:

articles.title: Jim Carrey Did Not Send an Impostor to Accept His César Award
articles.description: Music, Film, TV and Political News Coverage
articles.content: Last week, Jim Carrey was in Paris for the César Awards, France’s national film prize and one of its highest honours. The comedy great was recognised with an Honorary César and he met the occasion by delivering an acceptance speech entirely in French... [2705 chars]

articles.title: ‘Best Medicine’ Renewed for Season 2 at Fox
articles.description: Fox has renewed its dramedy ‘Best Medicine’ for a second season in 2026-27 after a strong showing in its first run.
articles.content:
Fox is making another appointment with Best Medicine.

articles.description: Yerin Ha stars in season four of "Bridgerton" as Sophie Baek, Benedict Bridgerton's love interest.
